title: Robots of the Wasteland
description: Adds craftable and tameable robots from Fallout!
body:
# About the Mod!

Currently the mod adds Yes Man, Victor, and Muggy! I am working on adding even more securitron personalities and more robot types soon!



# Mod Guide!
### TAMING ITEMS

Victor - Cowboy Hat

Muggy - Mug

Yes Man - Cobblestone (it's readily available in almost every biome, he's the easiest to tame!)

Jane - Dandelion

 
### RECIPES
Items

Cowboy Hat
![2 rows of 3 leather ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9a0d9fd2b223101302423fefb5b617431ed2d2d.png)
** PLEASE NOTE: this item is not currently not wearable yet!

Yes Man AI
![1 redstone in the middle, with 8 glass surronding it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c180e74cb6d4693b3299da10a8733323bfa2f286.png)

Mug
![5 Clay balls, in a U shape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d61028b73592bfb09bb4880f6c7cb99ae1386047.png)


### Robots


Muggy
![row one: Iron Ingot, Mug, Iron Ingot. Row 2: Iron Ingot, Glass, Iron Ingot. Row 3: Redstone, Iron Ingot, Redstone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc4c7e2883b9468366d2537b4c426b832b3165b4.png)

Victor
![Row 1: Iron Block, Cowboy Hat, Iron Block. Row 2: Iron Block, Glass, Iron Block Row 3: Redstone Block, Iron Block, Redstone Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9632c7c55aaf594c898c9b8978a2ed6701e69b8.png)

Yes Man
![Row 1: Iron Block, Yes Man AI, Iron Block. Row 2: Iron Block, Glass, Iron Block. row 3: Redstone Block, Iron Block, Redstone Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca5343583e0e2dc68b2adf5f7f828a5235dcffc.png)

Jane
![Row 1: Iron Block, Dandelion, Iron Block. Row 2: Iron Block, Glass, Iron Block. row 3: Redstone Block, Iron Block, Redstone Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f8f4a466f2cf2018aa1b57c900337cfef0daaf2.png)

If you run into any bugs please let me know!
